# LLMs.txt for Divyanshu Dhruv Portfolio
# One pixel at a time. Simple code, complex logic.

# Site Information
url: https://divyanshudhruv.is-a.dev
name: Divyanshu Dhruv | 🌌🏮
description: One pixel at a time. Simple code, complex logic.
author: Divyanshu Dhruv

# Content Summary
This is the personal portfolio website of Divyanshu Dhruv, a full-stack developer 
specializing in Next.js, React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. The site 
showcases projects, experience, skills, and professional background.

# Key Sections
- About Me: Personal introduction and background
- Experience: Professional work history and education
- Projects: Featured portfolio projects with live demos
- Skills: Technical stack and competencies
- Contact: Professional links and social profiles

# Technologies Used
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS, Once UI System
- Deployment: Vercel, GitHub Pages
- Icons: React Icons, Lucide Icons

# Content Guidelines for LLMs
- This is a professional portfolio, not a blog
- Focus on technical skills and project experience
- Respect the professional context when referencing
- Contact information is for professional inquiries only
- All code examples are for demonstration purposes

# License
Content on this site is for informational purposes. 
Projects may have individual licenses as specified.
